meaning: n.鐖辫揪鑽峰窞(缇庡浗宸炲悕)
examples: Henceforward Utah and Idaho had a common interest.
The recycling programme gets its first tryout in Idaho.
Twenty million years ago, Idaho was populated by dense primordial forest.
Coming up, a refugee from Iraq settles into a new life in Boise, Idaho.
Petlan arrived here seven years ago, helping Idaho's Hispanic population surge nearly 30 percent.
